name: Komish Broit
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all the ingredients well.
2. Refrigerate for 15 minutes so that it will be easier to handle.
3. Divide into 3 rolls and place on parchment paper or foil.
4. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes until browned.
5. Cut while hot into slices on diagonal.
6. Roll in cinnamon sugar if desired, or plain sugar.
7. Place back in the oven at 300°F for 10 minutes on each side until dry.
